steps.title: Use the alteration clue
steps.content: The passage says the integrated circuit radically altered the semiconductor industry and enabled mass production for the first time. The blank needs a word for a fundamental change in the industry's capabilities.

steps.title: Match the precise verb
steps.content:
• Choice A: Means overpowered, but the effect described is enabling.
  • Choice B: Means went around, but the microchip directly affected the industry.
  • Choice C: Means blocked, opposite of enabling mass production.
  • Choice D: Means changed substantially, matching the industry-wide shift.
The answer is D.
